{{Quote|Behind you!|Elsek, to Avarik|<ref name="Pattern and Web">{{RJRadio|Pattern and Web}}</ref>}}
'''Elsek''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] who served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] and a [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]], eventually serving in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|human]]<ref name="VD" /> from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], Elsek became a member of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper corps]] following graduation from [[Corulag Academy]].<ref name="CCG" /> He was partners with [[Avarik]] since graduation from the academy. He was often forced to cover for his partner's rash decisions, such as bailing Avarik out of fights with drunks in local bars and enlisted clubs. Sometime during his service, he attained the rank of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]].<ref name="CCG" /> When Avarik was accosted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], he signaled Elsek to go for help. As Elsek took off on his [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] destroyed it with his [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]], and the scout was propelled into the air.

==Behind the scenes==
Elsek first appeared as an unnamed background extra in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. He was later identified, and given a brief backstory in the [[Endor Limited|''Endor Limited'']] expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], published in [[June]] [[1999]].
